fields.title: agent: cascading teardown on close
fields.description: When an agent is closed, all its descendants (children, grandchildren, etc.) should also be closed. Prevents orphaned sub-agents consuming resources.nnerg-effect reference: collectDescendantIds walks the parent-child tree starting from the target, removes all found actors, and cleans up each.
fields.design: Add a collectDescendants helper that, given an agent id and the parent map, returns all transitive children (BFS/DFS). In manager.shutdown, call collectDescendants, then shut down each in reverse-depth order (leaves first). Clean up both the agents HashMap and the parent tracking for all removed ids. Return the list of closed ids so the tool layer can report them.
fields.acceptance_criteria: Closing agent A that spawned B which spawned C results in all three being shut down. No orphaned agents remain in the HashMap. The tool response includes all closed agent ids.
fields.notes: Follow-up: updated AgentControl.close to explicitly return manager.shutdown result. Re-ran npm run gate in extensions/tau; typecheck/lint/test passed (existing lint warnings unchanged).
fields.close_reason: Implemented and reviewed. Cascading teardown with collectDescendants BFS.
